name: Easy Rhubarb Jam
recipeIngredient: 1 small package strawberry or raspberry Jell-O
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the first three ingredients and let stand 2 hours.
2. Boil for 12 minutes.
3. Remove from heat, add the dry Jell-O, stir.
4. Pour into jars or plastic containers.
5. Refrigerate. Can be frozen or sealed in jars.
